SegmentUpscaleRunner.description: Generic queued segmentation runner for arbitrary ComfyUI video workflows. It mutates LoadVideo skip/cap per segment and can merge segment videos afterward.

total_frames.name: Total Frames
total_frames.tooltip: Total source frame count. Connect this to VHS_LoadVideo.frame_count or Video Info Probe.total_frames.

frame_rate.name: Frame Rate
frame_rate.tooltip: Source FPS. Connect this to VHS_LoadVideo.fps or Video Info Probe.frame_rate.

segment_count.name: Segment Count
segment_count.tooltip: How many queued segments to split the job into.

start_segment.name: Start Segment
start_segment.tooltip: Segment number to start from. Useful for manual resume.

overlap_frames.name: Model Context Overlap
overlap_frames.tooltip: Previous-tail source frames read into the next segment as temporal context.

execute.name: Execute
execute.tooltip: Off = preview the plan only. On = start the queued segment run.

load_video_node_id.name: Load Video Node ID
load_video_node_id.tooltip: Node ID of VHS_LoadVideo or compatible LoadVideo node.

trimmer_node_id.name: Final Dedup Trimmer ID
trimmer_node_id.tooltip: Node ID of SegmentFrameTrimmer. Place it after VFI and before VideoCombine.

bridge_trimmer_node_id.name: Pre-VFI Bridge Trimmer ID
bridge_trimmer_node_id.tooltip: Node ID of SegmentVfiBridgeTrimmer. Place it after upscale/denoise and before VFI.

vfi_bridge_frames.name: VFI Bridge Frames
vfi_bridge_frames.tooltip: Previous-tail frames kept before VFI. 1 is usually enough; 2 may help unstable boundaries.

trim_multiplier_override.name: Interpolation Output Multiplier
trim_multiplier_override.tooltip: 0 = auto-detect. Set 2, 4, etc. if the VFI multiplier cannot be detected.

prune_cleanup_debug_nodes.name: Skip Preview/Debug Branches
prune_cleanup_debug_nodes.tooltip: Skip preview/show/debug/legacy cleanup branches in child prompts. This is not memory cleanup.

clear_segment_history.name: Clear Segment History
clear_segment_history.tooltip: Delete each completed child prompt from ComfyUI history after recording its output path.

merge_segments.name: Merge Segments
merge_segments.tooltip: Merge finished segment videos with ffmpeg concat.

merged_filename_prefix.name: Merged Filename Prefix
merged_filename_prefix.tooltip: Filename prefix for the merged video.

enable_checkpoint.name: Enable Checkpoint
enable_checkpoint.tooltip: Write a checkpoint after each successful segment.

auto_resume_checkpoint.name: Auto Resume Checkpoint
auto_resume_checkpoint.tooltip: Resume from checkpoint next_seg when available.

clear_checkpoint_on_finish.name: Clear Checkpoint On Finish
clear_checkpoint_on_finish.tooltip: Delete the checkpoint after all segments finish.

pre_segment_paths.name: Pre-Segment Paths
pre_segment_paths.tooltip: Comma-separated already-finished segment videos to prepend during merge.

reference_image_node_id.name: Reference Image Node ID
reference_image_node_id.tooltip: Optional LoadImage-like node ID to replace per segment.

segment_reference_images.name: Segment Reference Images
segment_reference_images.tooltip: Optional comma-separated reference image files. If fewer than segments, the last one is reused.

segment_io_mode.name: Segment Input Mode
segment_io_mode.tooltip: Generic mode now uses frame_window only: mutate LoadVideo skip/cap for each child prompt.

physical_slice_subdir.name: Deprecated Slice Folder
physical_slice_subdir.tooltip: Deprecated compatibility field. Physical slice mode has been retired.

physical_slice_crf.name: Deprecated Slice CRF
physical_slice_crf.tooltip: Deprecated compatibility field. Physical slice mode has been retired.

reuse_physical_slices.name: Deprecated Reuse Slices
reuse_physical_slices.tooltip: Deprecated compatibility field. Physical slice mode has been retired.

SegmentVSRFIStreamRunner.description: Streaming FlashVSR + VFI runner for long videos. Reads source chunks from disk, carries bridge frames across chunks, and writes encoded video directly through ffmpeg.

video_path.name: Video Path
video_path.tooltip: Input video path, or a filename relative to ComfyUI/input.

output_path.name: Output Path
output_path.tooltip: Output mp4 path. Leave blank to save under output/VSRFI.

execute.name: Execute
execute.tooltip: Off = preview/log settings. On = process the video.

interpolation_factor.name: Interpolation Factor
interpolation_factor.tooltip: FPS multiplier. 2 turns 25fps into 50fps. Values below 2 skip interpolation.

vfi_method.name: VFI Method
vfi_method.tooltip: GIMM-VFI by default. RIFE/FILM require ComfyUI-Frame-Interpolation.

frames_per_chunk.name: Frames Per Chunk
frames_per_chunk.tooltip: New source frames processed per chunk. Lower is safer; higher is faster.

bridge_frames.name: Bridge Frames
bridge_frames.tooltip: Previous-tail source frames carried into the next chunk. 1 preserves boundary interpolation; 4-8 gives FlashVSR more context.

max_tile_kilopixels.name: Max Tile Kilopixels
max_tile_kilopixels.tooltip: VSR tile limit. 0 lets VSRFI auto-pick from available VRAM.

max_gimm_kilopixels.name: Max GIMM Kilopixels
max_gimm_kilopixels.tooltip: GIMM-VFI flow limit. 0 lets VSRFI auto-pick.

skip_first_frames.name: Skip First Frames
skip_first_frames.tooltip: Start processing after this many source frames.

frame_load_cap.name: Frame Load Cap
frame_load_cap.tooltip: 0 processes the rest of the video.

SegmentFrameTrimmer.description: Trim duplicate bridge frames before saving. SegmentUpscaleRunner controls it automatically.

SegmentVfiBridgeTrimmer.description: Place after upscale/denoise and before VFI. It keeps only bridge frames needed for interpolation.

SegmentRunLogViewer.description: Show runner logs inside the ComfyUI canvas.

runner_node_id.name: Runner Node ID
runner_node_id.tooltip: Leave empty to show all in-memory runner logs.

clear_after_read.name: Clear After Read
clear_after_read.tooltip: Clear this runner log after reading.

SegmentVideoInfoProbe.description: Read video metadata without loading IMAGE tensors.

frame_load_cap.name: Frame Load Cap
frame_load_cap.tooltip: 0 means until the end after skip.
